scenario: You have arrived at your hotel in Samarkand after a long journey and need to check in at reception.

variants.description: Smooth check-in — room is ready and everything is in order

turns.speaker: npc
turns.uzbek: Ha, topildi. Siz uch tun qolasiz. Xonangiz uchinchi qavatda.
turns.english: Yes, found it. You are staying three nights. Your room is on the third floor.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.uzbek: Ha, nonushta ertalab soat yettidan o'ngacha.
turns.english: Yes, breakfast is from seven to ten in the morning.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Thank you! What is the wi-fi password?

variants.description: Your room isn't ready yet — you wait in the lobby

turns.speaker: npc
turns.uzbek: Kechirasiz, xonangiz hali tayyor emas. Otuz daqiqa kuting.
turns.english: Sorry, your room is not ready yet. Please wait thirty minutes.

turns.speaker: user
turns.uzbek: Yaxshi, kutaman. Bagajimni qo'yib ketsam maylimi?
turns.english: Alright, I'll wait. May I leave my luggage here?

turns.speaker: npc
turns.uzbek: Albatta! Mana qabul xonasi. Choy ichasizmi?
turns.english: Of course! Here is the lobby. Would you like some tea?

variants.description: The room type is different from what you booked

turns.speaker: npc
turns.uzbek: Topildi. Sizga ikki kishilik xona tayyor.
turns.english: Found it. A double room is ready for you.

turns.speaker: user
turns.uzbek: Kechirasiz, men bir kishilik xona bron qilganman.
turns.english: Excuse me, I booked a single room.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.uzbek: Uzr, xato bo'libdi. Bir kishilik xona ham bor, narxi bir oz yuqori.
turns.english: Sorry, there has been a mistake. A single room is also available, the price is a little higher.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Alright, I'll take the single room.
